items.title: ICE agents may have lied about shooting of migrant in Minneapolis, officials say
items.dek: ICE chief Todd Lyons says the two officers were immediately placed on administrative leave.
items.body: ICE chief Todd Lyons says the two officers were immediately placed on administrative leave.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: France probes baby formula producers over contamination recalls
items.dek: Paris prosecutors will investigate whether five firms are culpable for distributing batches that may have contained a toxin.
items.body: Paris prosecutors will investigate whether five firms are culpable for distributing batches that may have contained a toxin.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'We are not protected' says Hebron mayor as Israel expands West Bank control
items.dek: Palestinians say an Israeli power grab shuts them out of decisions on planning and development in West Bank.
items.body: Palestinians say an Israeli power grab shuts them out of decisions on planning and development in West Bank.
items.author: IriLine Desk
